name: Hummingbird Loans
description_short: Hummingbird Loans offers fast emergency cash loans up to $2,500 with same-day funding, no credit check required, and partnership with tribal lenders for installment options.
description_long:
Hummingbird Loans operates as an online short-term lending platform specializing in emergency cash access. The company positions itself in the competitive online lending space by emphasizing customer service and rapid funding processes. They market primarily through their website at hummingbirdloansz.com and maintain a physical address in Las Vegas, Nevada.

The company offers emergency loans up to $2,500 with advertised instant approval and same-day or next-day bank deposits. A key feature is their "no credit check" policy, explicitly welcoming applicants with bad credit ratings. They also partner with tribal lenders to offer installment loans up to $20,000 for consumers with poor credit histories. Their website indicates these are unsecured loans with guaranteed approval claims.

Hummingbird Loans emphasizes customer service accessibility, providing multiple contact channels including email (support@hummingbirdloansz.com), phone (844-546-4390), and mailing address. They offer online resources including "How it Works," FAQ, and "About Us" pages. The company also advertises scholarship opportunities to customers, suggesting a broader community engagement approach.

As an emergency cash lender, Hummingbird Loans targets consumers in immediate financial need who may have poor credit or limited traditional borrowing options. However, the website lacks transparent pricing information, APR disclosure, and terms details—critical information for evaluating the true cost of borrowing. The emphasis on tribal lending partnerships and guaranteed approval without credit checks suggests higher-risk lending typical of this category, which generally carries significantly higher costs than traditional personal loans.
address: 9620 S Las Vegas Blvd, Las Vegas, NV 89123

company_info.headquarters: 9620 S Las Vegas Blvd, Las Vegas, NV 89123

pros: Same-day or next-day funding to bank account after approval
No credit check required; explicitly welcomes applicants with bad credit
Loan amounts up to $2,500 for emergency cash needs
Multiple contact channels available: phone, email, and mail
Partnership with tribal lenders offering installment loans up to $20,000
Online resources including FAQ and How it Works pages
cons: Website contains no APR, fee, or interest rate disclosure—critical pricing information is absent
No transparent explanation of loan terms, repayment schedules, or cost comparisons
Guaranteed approval claims combined with no credit check suggests predatory lending characteristics typical of high-cost emergency loans
Physical address listed (Las Vegas) with limited company background or licensing information displayed
Tribal lender partnerships may indicate variable regulatory oversight depending on tribal jurisdiction
best_for: Consumers with bad credit needing immediate cash for emergencies
Borrowers unable to qualify for traditional bank loans or payday alternatives
People facing urgent financial gaps who prioritize speed over cost
diagnosis: Hummingbird Loans is best for borrowers with poor credit facing immediate cash needs who cannot qualify for traditional emergency loans or credit union PALs. Critical caveat: the website provides no APR, fees, or interest rate information—essential before borrowing, as emergency cash loans typically carry very high costs (often 200%+ APR). Always compare rates and verify tribal lender regulatory status before proceeding.
services: Installment loans up to $20,000 through tribal lender partnerships
FAQ and How it Works resources
quarantine_reason: Website hacked — serving cialis/spam content. Delisted 2026-04-01.
